input.title: Fintech startup LedgerPay prices IPO at $22, to trade as LDGR
input.content: LedgerPay priced its initial public offering at $22 per share and will begin trading on the Nasdaq under the ticker LDGR. The company raised $480 million. Proceeds will fund product expansion. No prior public financials were restated in the article.

mockModelResponse.headline: LedgerPay prices IPO, ticker LDGR
mockModelResponse.summary: LedgerPay completed its IPO at $22 a share and will list as LDGR, raising about $480 million for expansion.

meta.notes: IPO listing debut with new ticker.
